title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account even after resetting the password multiple times.

title: Password Reset Email Not Received
description: Customer requested a password reset but did not receive the email in their inbox.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their invoice from the billing section.

title: Payment Failed but Amount Deducted
description: Customer reports payment failed but the bank deducted the amount.

title: Website Loading Very Slowly
description: Customer experiencing slow loading time on dashboard pages.

title: Profile Update Not Saving
description: Customer unable to update profile information after editing.

title: Error 500 on Dashboard
description: Customer reports internal server error when opening dashboard.

title: Notification Emails Not Sending
description: Customer not receiving notification emails after performing actions.

title: Cannot Upload Profile Picture
description: Customer unable to upload profile image due to upload error.

title: Subscription Plan Not Updating
description: Customer upgraded plan but dashboard still shows old plan.

title: Mobile Layout Broken
description: Customer reports UI layout issues on mobile devices.

title: Search Feature Not Working
description: Customer cannot search tickets using the search bar.
